compiled_state.title: test-estimate-context-load.sh fails: script path resolves to missing scripts/ shim
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: test-estimate-context-load.sh references $SCRIPT_DIR/../scripts/estimate-context-load.sh but no shim exists at repo-root scripts/. The canonical script is at plugins/dso/scripts/estimate-context-load.sh. Pre-existing on main as of c18def4f.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
